de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl

Class SecurityLattice

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl.SecurityLattice

  • public class SecurityLattice
extends Object
    A lattice of security domains in RIFL. While the lattice is not necessarily complete, there are distinct top and bottom elements. Instances of this class are mutable; new domains can be added and put into a hierarchy. However, in any state the integrity is checked (top/bottom, acyclicity).

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  SecurityLattice.SecurityDomain
      The kind of elements to the security lattice.

    • Constructor Detail

      • SecurityLattice

        public SecurityLattice()
        Creates a two-element lattice.

    • Method Detail

      • addDomain

        SecurityLattice.SecurityDomain addDomain(String name)
        Creates a new security domain and adds it to the lattice. The new domain is a direct subdomain of top and direct super-domain of bottom.
        Parameters:
        name - name of the new domain (must not be "top" or "bottom")
        Returns:
        the new domain

      • putSubDomain

        void putSubDomain(SecurityLattice.SecurityDomain sup,
                SecurityLattice.SecurityDomain sub)
        Refine the lattice by declaring a sub-domain relation between two domains. This checks whether the domains are already in the lattice and that the lattice is still acyclic.

      • top

        public SecurityLattice.SecurityDomain top()

      • bottom

        public SecurityLattice.SecurityDomain bottom()

      • contains

        public boolean contains(SecurityLattice.SecurityDomain d)
